clusters.justification: These terms collectively map onto salience and limbic co-activation networks, such as the amygdala and anterior insula, representing the broad functional domain of generalized emotional arousal and valence processing.

These concepts share robust co-activation across mesocorticolimbic pathways, including the ventral striatum and ventromedial prefrontal cortex, which compute incentive salience, expected outcomes, and goal-directed drives.

These terms share macroscopic topography within the default mode network, representing an overarching axis of internally directed, self-generated abstract representations encompassing both self-referential thought and the modeling of others' minds.
